basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 23-06-2026 on the official website jncasr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemistry or Life Sciences
qualification.details: PhD in Chemistry or Life Sciences with good research experience and publication record. Desirable: research experience in Chemical Biology, Neuroscience, or Biomedical Sciences

salary_details.details: Rs. 58,000/- plus applicable HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JNCASR Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JNCASR Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.jawaharlal_nehru_centre_for_advanced_sci: PhD in Chemistry or Life Sciences

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR Research Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD in Chemistry or Life Sciences with good research experience and publication record. Desirable: research experience in Chemical Biology, Neuroscience, or Biomedical Sciences

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 58,000/- plus applicable HRA Per Month

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at JNCASR is 09-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Chemistry or Life Sciences. Additional desirable experience in Chemical Biology, Neuroscience, or Biomedical Sciences is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Research Associate at JNCASR is NCU-EMR-170.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre For Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR).

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at JNCASR is a contractual job.
